title: From Human Memory to AI Memory: A Survey on Memory Mechanisms in the Era of LLMs
snippet: Comprehensive survey proposing categorization of memory-related work based on three dimensions (object, form, time) and eight quadrants. Covers parametric and non-parametric memory, personal and system memory, short-term and long-term memory.

title: Memory in the Age of AI Agents: A Survey
snippet: Survey proposing finer-grained taxonomy distinguishing factual, experiential, and working memory from functional perspective, and analyzing how memory is formed, evolved, and retrieved over time from dynamics perspective.

title: A Survey on the Memory Mechanism of Large Language Model-based Agents (ACM TOIS)
snippet: First comprehensive survey in ACM Transactions on Information Systems focusing on memory mechanisms of LLM-based agents. Covers short-term and long-term memory, memory reading and writing operations.

title: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms
snippet: Evolutionary framework formalizing LLM agent memory development into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), Experience (trajectory abstraction).

title: Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents (CoALA)
snippet: Framework mapping LLM agents to cognitive architecture concepts (ACT-R, Soar). Proposes working memory, episodic memory, semantic memory, and procedural memory as core agent memory types.

title: Cognitive Memory in Large Language Models
snippet: Explores how cognitive memory concepts (working, episodic, semantic) from human psychology map to LLM memory architectures and implementations.

title: MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
snippet: Proposes virtual context management drawing inspiration from OS hierarchical memory (paging). Two-tier memory: main context (limited) and external storage (unlimited). Self-editing memory via tool calls. Foundation of Letta framework.

title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
snippet: Stanford/Google paper introducing memory stream architecture with three components: memory stream (long-term storage), reflection (higher-level synthesis), and planning (action generation). Foundational work for agent memory.

title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
snippet: NeurIPS 2023 paper. Agents verbally reflect on task feedback signals and maintain reflective text in episodic memory buffer. Achieves 91% pass@1 on HumanEval. Memory as self-improvement mechanism.

title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
snippet: First LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent in Minecraft. Skill library as procedural memory: successful programs stored as executable code, indexed by embeddings, retrieved for reuse. From NVIDIA/Caltech/Stanford.

title: A-MEM: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents
snippet: Self-organizing memory system based on Zettelkasten method. Creates interconnected knowledge networks through dynamic indexing and linking. Doubles performance on complex multi-hop reasoning. NeurIPS 2025.

title: EverMemOS: A Self-Organizing Memory Operating System for Structured Long-Horizon Reasoning
snippet: Engram-inspired memory lifecycle: Episodic Trace Formation, Semantic Consolidation, Reconstructive Recollection. 92.3% reasoning accuracy on LoCoMo. Three-stage memory architecture.

title: MAGMA: A Multi-Graph based Agentic Memory Architecture for AI Agents
snippet: Multi-graph memory: orthogonal semantic, temporal, causal, and entity graphs. Policy-guided traversal for retrieval. 45.5% higher reasoning accuracy, 95% token reduction vs prior methods.

title: Mnemis: Dual-Route Retrieval on Hierarchical Graphs for Long-Term LLM Memory
snippet: Microsoft. Integrates System-1 similarity search with System-2 Global Selection. Base graph + hierarchical graph. 93.9 on LoCoMo, 91.6 on LongMemEval-S. Nodes can belong to multiple categories.

title: Continuum Memory Architectures for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
snippet: Proposes continuum memory architectures for maintaining coherent behavior over extended agent interactions.

title: Agentic Memory: Learning Unified Long-Term and Short-Term Memory Management
snippet: Proposes unified framework for learning both long-term and short-term memory management in LLM agents.

title: HippoRAG: Neurobiologically Inspired Long-Term Memory for Large Language Models
snippet: NeurIPS 2024. RAG framework inspired by hippocampal memory. Synergizes LLMs, knowledge graphs, and Personalized PageRank. Mimics neocortex/hippocampus roles in human memory.

title: RAPTOR: Recursive Abstractive Processing for Tree-Organized Retrieval
snippet: Recursively embeds, clusters, and summarizes text chunks into tree structure. Retrieves across levels of abstraction. 20% absolute accuracy improvement on QuALITY benchmark with GPT-4.

title: LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation
snippet: EMNLP 2025. Dual-level retrieval with graph structures and vector representations. Five retrieval modes. Incremental updates without full reconstruction. 31K+ GitHub stars.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large Language Models: A Survey
snippet: Comprehensive survey covering Naive RAG, Advanced RAG, and Modular RAG paradigms. RAG as non-parametric memory extending LLM's parametric knowledge.

title: Zep: A Temporal Knowledge Graph Architecture for Agent Memory
snippet: Temporal knowledge graph combining conversations and structured business data. Tracks how facts change over time. Foundation architecture for Graphiti framework.

title: MemOS: An Operating System for Memory-Augmented Generation in Large Language Models
snippet: Three memory types: Plaintext (explicit knowledge), Parametric (model weights + LoRA), Activation (inference-time state including KV-cache). First Memory OS concept proposal (May 2025).

title: LoCoMo: Evaluating Very Long-Term Conversational Memory of LLM Agents
snippet: ACL 2024 benchmark. 50 conversations averaging 9K tokens across 35 sessions. Evaluates QA, event summarization, multimodal dialogue generation. Up to 600 turns per dialogue.

title: MemoryCD: Benchmarking Long-Context User Memory of LLM Agents for Lifelong Cross-Domain Personalization
snippet: Benchmark for evaluating long-context user memory across multiple domains for personalization tasks.

title: LifeBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Multi-Source Memory
snippet: Benchmark evaluating long-horizon memory from multiple sources for LLM agents.

title: Mem0: Universal Memory Layer for AI Agents
snippet: 51.5K stars. Hybrid datastore: graph + vector + key-value. Y Combinator backed, raised $24M. Powers millions of interactions daily. Open-source with managed platform.

title: claude-mem: Memory for Claude
snippet: 43.7K stars. Memory extension for Claude AI, enabling persistent memory across sessions.

title: Graphiti: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents
snippet: 24.4K stars. Temporal context graph engine by Zep. Real-time incremental ingestion, P95 latency 300ms. Supports FalkorDB. MCP server with hundreds of thousands of weekly users.

title: Letta (formerly MemGPT): Platform for Stateful Agents
snippet: 21.8K stars. Self-editing memory via tool calls. REST API + Python/TypeScript SDKs. Agent Development Environment GUI. Agents persist to database.

title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
snippet: 21K stars. Stanford/Google implementation of memory stream, reflection, and planning architecture for believable agent behavior simulation.

title: SuperMemory: Memory Engine and Second Brain for AI
snippet: 20.6K stars. Fast and scalable memory API. Browser extension + MCP server. Syncs from Google Drive, Gmail, Notion. Processes PDFs, images (OCR), videos.

title: Cognee: Knowledge Engine for AI Agent Memory
snippet: 14.8K stars. Knowledge engine in 6 lines of code. Builds knowledge graphs for agent memory. Supports multiple LLM providers and vector stores.

title: MemOS: AI Memory OS for LLM and Agent Systems
snippet: 8K stars. Persistent skill memory for cross-task reuse and evolution. Unified API for graph-based memory. Three memory types: plaintext, parametric, activation.

title: Voyager: Open-Ended Embodied Agent with LLMs
snippet: 6.8K stars. Skill library as procedural memory. Automatic curriculum + iterative prompting. 3.3x more unique items, 15.3x faster tech tree unlocking vs prior SOTA.

title: Hindsight: Agent Memory That Learns
snippet: 6.7K stars. Biomimetic memory: World facts, Experiences, Mental Models. SOTA on LongMemEval. Time-aware with sparse/dense vector representations.

title: OpenMemory: Local Persistent Memory Store for LLM Applications
snippet: 3.8K stars. Cross-agent memory for Claude Desktop, GitHub Copilot, Codex. Migration tool for importing from Mem0, Zep, SuperMemory.

title: EverMemOS: Self-Organizing Memory Operating System
snippet: 3.5K stars. Engram-inspired lifecycle. MemCells -> MemScenes. SOTA on LoCoMo (92.3%) and LongMemEval. User profiling and foresight capabilities.

title: HippoRAG: Neurobiologically Inspired Long-Term Memory
snippet: 3.3K stars. NeurIPS 2024. Knowledge graphs + Personalized PageRank. HippoRAG 2 achieves 7% improvement on associative memory tasks.

title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
snippet: 3.1K stars. NeurIPS 2023. Verbal reinforcement learning via episodic memory of self-reflections. 91% pass@1 on HumanEval.

title: Agent Memory Paper List: Curated list from 'Memory in the Age of AI Agents' survey
snippet: 1.7K stars. Comprehensive paper list accompanying the survey on AI agent memory. Regularly updated with new publications.

title: RAPTOR: Recursive Abstractive Processing for Tree-Organized Retrieval
snippet: 1.6K stars. Official implementation. Recursive clustering and summarization into tree structure for multi-level retrieval.

title: LangMem: Memory Capabilities for LangGraph Agents
snippet: 1.4K stars. By LangChain team. Library (not service) adding memory to LangGraph agents. Free and open source.

title: A-MEM: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents
snippet: 941 stars. Zettelkasten-inspired self-organizing memory. Dynamic indexing, linking, and memory evolution. NeurIPS 2025 paper implementation.

title: General Agentic Memory: Powered by Deep-Research
snippet: 836 stars. General memory system for agents powered by deep-research methodology.

title: Awesome-AI-Memory: Curated Knowledge Base on AI Memory
snippet: 641 stars. Centralized, continuously updated knowledge base on LLM memory and agent memory research, frameworks, benchmarks, and applications.

title: Agentic Memory: Cognitive Architecture Concepts for LLM Systems
snippet: 520 stars. Implementing cognitive architecture and psychological memory concepts into agentic LLM systems.

title: Mnemis: Dual-Route Retrieval on Hierarchical Graphs for Long-Term LLM Memory
snippet: 53 stars. Microsoft. System-1 + System-2 retrieval. 93.9 on LoCoMo. Multi-category hierarchical graph with base graph.

title: Microsoft GraphRAG: Modular Graph-Based RAG System
snippet: 31.9K stars. Entity-centric knowledge graphs with community detection and summarization. Local, Global, DRIFT, and Basic search modes.

title: LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation
snippet: 31.2K stars. EMNLP 2025. Dual-level retrieval with graph + vector. Five retrieval modes. Incremental updates without full reconstruction.

title: LangChain: Building Applications with LLMs
snippet: 131.7K stars. ConversationBufferMemory, ConversationSummaryMemory (deprecated in v0.3.1). Now uses LangGraph checkpointing. InMemorySaver, SqliteSaver for persistence.

title: Memory and New Controls for ChatGPT (OpenAI)
snippet: ChatGPT memory saves details across conversations. Auto-saves or user-directed. Free users get lightweight short-term continuity; Plus/Pro get longer-term understanding.

title: Claude Memory Tool (Anthropic API Docs)
snippet: Official Anthropic memory server via MCP. Knowledge graph storage with entities/relations. File-based CLAUDE.md approach for transparent persistent memory.

title: Zep: Context Engineering & Agent Memory Platform
snippet: Commercial platform using temporal knowledge graphs. Combines conversations and structured business data. Graphiti engine with P95 latency of 300ms.

title: Mem0: AI Memory Layer for AI Agents
snippet: Commercial platform with $24M funding (Seed + Series A). Hybrid graph+vector+key-value store. Powers millions of daily interactions. Y Combinator backed.

title: Letta: Platform for Building Stateful Agents
snippet: Commercial platform (formerly MemGPT). REST API + SDKs. Agent Development Environment. Self-editing memory tools. DeepLearning.AI course partnership.

title: Claude Code Memory Management (Anthropic Docs)
snippet: File-based CLAUDE.md memory system. Compaction keeps context manageable. Memory persists across compaction boundaries. Transparent, editable markdown files.

title: Google Gemini: Context Window, Token Limits, and Memory in 2025
snippet: Personal Context feature enabled by default. Gemini 3 roadmap: context fusion, adaptive compression, cross-app recall, private long-term memory mode.

title: Conversational Memory in LangChain (Tutorial)
snippet: Tutorial covering ConversationBufferMemory, ConversationSummaryMemory, ConversationSummaryBufferMemory, ConversationKGMemory, and migration to LangGraph checkpointing.

title: LLMs as Operating Systems: Agent Memory (DeepLearning.AI Course)
snippet: Coursera guided project by Letta founders. Covers MemGPT paper concepts, two-tier memory, self-editing memory via tool calls. Under 2 hours.

title: Design Patterns for Long-Term Memory in LLM-Powered Architectures (Serokell)
snippet: Covers memory design patterns: buffer, summary, knowledge graph, hybrid approaches. Practical implementation guidance for production systems.

title: Conversational Memory for LLMs with LangChain (Pinecone Tutorial)
snippet: Tutorial series covering LangChain memory types, vector store integration, and persistent memory patterns.

title: Agentic LLM Memory Architectures Course: Long-Term Memory with Vector Stores
snippet: Course chapter on designing memory systems using vector stores and embeddings for long-term agent memory.

title: Mem0 vs Zep vs LangMem vs MemoClaw: AI Agent Memory Comparison 2026
snippet: Head-to-head comparison of major memory frameworks. Evaluates architecture, features, performance, and use cases for each system.

title: Deep Dive into Memory for LLMs Architectures (Substack)
snippet: In-depth analysis of memory architectures for LLMs covering different approaches, trade-offs, and implementation patterns.

title: When AI Remembers Too Much: Persistent Behaviors in Agents' Memory (Palo Alto Networks)
snippet: Unit42 research on indirect prompt injection poisoning AI long-term memory. Malicious instructions persist across sessions once planted in memory.

title: MemoryGraft: Persistent Compromise of LLM Agents via Poisoned Experience Retrieval
snippet: Novel indirect injection attack exploiting agent's semantic imitation heuristic. Implants malicious experiences in long-term memory. More persistent than traditional prompt injection.

title: A Practical Memory Injection Attack against LLM Agent Memory Systems
snippet: MINJA attack enables injection of malicious records into memory bank via queries and output observations alone. Triggers malicious reasoning chains.

title: A Small Number of Samples Can Poison LLMs of Any Size (Anthropic)
snippet: As few as 250 malicious documents can create backdoor vulnerability in LLMs regardless of model size or training data volume.

title: Agentic AI Threats: Memory Poisoning & Long-Horizon Goal Hijacks (Lakera)
snippet: Analysis of memory poisoning and long-horizon goal hijacking in agentic AI systems. Self-sustaining compromises requiring no continued attacker involvement.

title: OWASP Top 10 Risks for LLMs (Cloudflare)
snippet: Industry standard risk framework for LLMs covering prompt injection, training data poisoning, model extraction attacks. Memory-related vulnerabilities across multiple risk categories.

title: CASS Memory System: Procedural Memory for AI Coding Agents
snippet: 304 stars. Transforms scattered session history into persistent cross-agent memory. Every agent learns from every other agent.

title: Memorix: Open-Source Cross-Agent Memory Layer via MCP
snippet: 340 stars. Compatible with Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Kiro, OpenCode.

title: Memori: SQL Native Memory Layer for LLMs and Agents
snippet: SQL-native memory approach. Outperformed Zep, LangMem, Mem0. Reduces prompt size by 67% vs Zep, context cost by 20x vs full-context prompting.

title: MemEval: Benchmark Suite for Evaluating Agent and LLM Memory Systems
snippet: 11 stars. Benchmark suite from Prosus AI for evaluating agent and LLM memory systems.

title: LLM Memory Architectures (Aussie AI)
snippet: Overview of LLM memory architecture research covering RL-driven memory management, hierarchical architectures, adaptive retrieval policies, and cross-agent synchronization.
